name: Neiman Marcus $250 Cookie
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together butter and both sugars until light and fluffy.
2. Add eggs and vanilla extract, mixing well to combine.
3. Gradually blend in flour, oatmeal, salt, baking powder, and baking soda.
4. Fold in chocolate chips, candy pieces, and chopped nuts.
5. Roll the dough into 1-inch balls and place them about 2 inches apart on an ungreased cookie sheet.
6. Bake for 6 minutes at 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
7. Allow cookies to cool on the baking sheet for a few minutes before transferring to a wire rack to cool completely.
Recipe can be halved as needed. Makes approximately 100-150 cookies. Note: The claim that Neiman Marcus charges $250 for this recipe is not accurate.
